3185400.name: The Ultimate Gate
3185400.description:
Welcome, My Friend!

Take A Look Around...

Another locked room, a sight you're all too familiar with. They call you the "Escape Master", simply because your escape skills are nothing short of extraordinary.

Each room is a brand-new puzzle. You’ll untangle every thread, remove every obstacle, until you stand on a stage surrounded by applause.

But that’s not the end — not even close, and you know it. There’s a door, one that's not part of the plan. It flickers in and out of view, appearing in every dream you have.

You’re getting closer to it. Every victory, every honor, is just another step toward that door.

You must open it, because... there’s no door in this world you can’t unlock.

Escape Room Strategy Guide:

Enjoy a Fun Time Solving Puzzles Together!

  • Look: What does the room look like? How many doors are there? Are the doors locked?

  • Listen: Tick-tock… How much time is left? What did the host say? Where are the clues to solve the puzzle?

  • Touch: How tall is that door? How does it feel ? Touch is a magic. Let your senses break through. The truth has always been right in the front of us. But with only eyes, we're always marching forward in eternal darkness.

  • Stop: Slow down, then again, make it slower.

Don't chase after mysteries, the mystery of the world is not a competition of answers.

The Lord asks; The Lord answers. It's the Mystery; It's the Answer. It's the Gate to the Truth; It's the Key to the Truth.

Ah… that Key has always been on the door. Can you not see it? Can you glimpse it too? The light of truth behind layers of puzzles?

"The Ultimate Gate"

The soul-searching journey of an escape room master.

Examine, Analyze, then Solve the puzzles.

So simple, so beautiful.

P.S.: This game is highly challenging, perfect for experts looking for a tough challenge!
3185400.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 繁体中文
